brief: Create a test paid ads campaign for Collision Worx (Collision Repair & Auto Body) serving McAllen & Mission, TX (Rio Grande Valley). Objective: generate leads (calls + estimate form submissions). Choose audience/demographic, offer, and messaging angles. Provide 4 distinct ad variants suitable for Meta (FB/IG) and Google Search RSA. Include headlines, primary text/descriptions, and CTA. Mention Free Estimates, Accepts All Insurance, Pickup/Delivery or Shuttle, After-hours call center where relevant. Include phone numbers: 956-331-8509 (McAllen) and 956-591-0323 (Mission).
